jokers.description: +1 Mult per hand played, -1 Mult per discard

jokers.name: Half Joker
jokers.description: +20 Mult if the played hand has 3 or fewer cards

jokers.name: Brainstorm
jokers.description: Copies the ability of the leftmost Joker

jokers.name: Hologram
jokers.description: This Joker gains X0.25 Mult every time a playing card is added to your deck

jokers.name: Stuntman
jokers.description: +250 Chips, -2 hand size
